tender_id.description: Unique identifier for this tender, derived from the document or filename

title.description: Full title of the tender as stated in the document

authority.description: Issuing authority or procuring entity name

contract_value_inr.description: Estimated contract value in Indian Rupees

document_url.description: Original document URL if obtained from a portal

source_file.description: Original filename of the source PDF

requirements.description: Structured list of all extracted requirements

raw_text_length.description: Character count of the extracted raw text (useful for diagnostics)

extraction_method.description: How text was extracted from the PDF

parsed_at.description: Timestamp when this tender was parsed (ISO 8601)
